message:
chore(beads): create comprehensive audit remediation epic with 40 beads

Full-codebase audit identified ~85 hard-coded constants that should be
configurable, 1 core TODO, and ~36 vendored crate TODO/FIXMEs.

Epic ft-8gmtq with 11 tracks:
- T1: TuningConfig infrastructure (foundation)
- T2: Critical constants (port, message size, kitty budget)
- T3: Runtime observation loop constants (15 values)
- T4: Ingest, pattern, search constants
- T5: Policy, audit, rate limiting constants
- T6: Workflow handler DRY unification (3 duplicated blocks)
- T7: Web API and streaming constants
- T8: Vendored crate constants (buffers, timeouts, accessibility)
- T9: Vendored crate TODO/FIXME remediation (6 high-priority)
- T10: Core TODO remediation (asupersync select, policy stub)
- T11: Validation and testing

All beads have detailed descriptions, acceptance criteria, exact file
locations with line numbers, and dependency structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
